Question 1 (continued)} Distribution of points ii. $\quad 1$ point For selecting "Down the ramp" iii. 1 point For a correct answer $\mathrm{a}=g=9.81 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2}$ (Note: $\mathrm{a}=g=10 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2}$ is also acceptable) Note: No work needs to be shown for this part

Question 2 (continued)} Distribution of points For correctly substituting into a correct kinematic equation $$ \begin{aligned} & v_{f A}^{2}=v_{0 A}^{2}+2 a(d / 2) \\ & v_{f A}^{2}=(2.29 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s})^{2}+2\left(-3.35 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2}\right)\left(\frac{0.783 \mathrm{~m}}{2}\right) \end{aligned} $$ For a correct answer $$ v_{A}=1.62 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s} \quad\left(\text { Note }: v_{A}=1.60 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s} \text { if } g=10 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2} \text { is used }\right) $$ For using a correct kinematic equation to determine the speed of block $B$ $$ \begin{aligned} v_{f B}^{2} & =v_{0}^{2}+2 a(d / 2) \\ v_{f B}^{2} & =0+2\left(3.35 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2}\right)\left(\frac{0.783 \mathrm{~m}}{2}\right) \\ v_{f B} & =1.62 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s} \end{aligned} $$ For correctly using conservation of momentum to determine the speed of the blocks after the collision $$ \begin{aligned} & m_{A} V_{A}+m_{B} V_{B}=\left(m_{A}+m_{B}\right) V_{f} \\ & V_{f}=\frac{(3.0 \mathrm{~kg})(1.62 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s})+(0.50 \mathrm{~kg})(-1.62 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s})}{(3.0 \mathrm{~kg}+0.50 \mathrm{~kg})} \end{aligned} $$ Correct answer $$ v_{f}=1.16 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s} \quad\left(\text { Note }: v_{f}=1.14 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s} \text { if } g=10 \mathrm{~m} / \mathrm{s}^{2} \text { is used }\right) $$ ii. 1 point For selecting "Up the ramp"
